name: Time Price Opportunity (TPO) Profile Charts - Sierra Chart
snippet:
The TPO Profile Chart study allows you to clearly see the areas where the market is trading at most of the time. The TPO Profile Chart study ...
By using a TPO chart, you are able to analyze the amount of trading activity, based on time, for each price level the market traded at for any given time period. The TPO Profile Chart study allows you to clearly see the areas where the market is trading at most of the time.

name: Time Price Opportunity (TPO) indicator — TradingView
snippet: With the Time Price Opportunity (TPO) indicator, also known as "Market Profile," you can analyze market activity by price level as it develops over time. It provides you with a unique perspective on market dynamics, price distribution, and price targets to help predict future market behavior.
